question: Which product categories get returned the most?
sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNTIF(oi.status = 'Returned'), COUNTIF(oi.status IN ('Complete', 'Shipped', 'Returned'))) * 100, 1) AS return_rate_pct, COUNTIF(oi.status = 'Returned') AS returned_items FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY return_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 15
analyst_notes: Return rate denominator = items that COULD have been returned (Complete + Shipped + Returned). Including Cancelled or Processing in the denominator deflates the rate. Show absolute counts too — a 30% rate on 10 items is noise.
author: claude-draft
